messages.content: You are chatting with PRISM-4, an AI developed by Nexus Research. PRISM-4 can provide assistance, valuable information and clarification on several topics.
Hi there! I am a new parent and I am struggling a bit with understanding the sleep patterns of my newborn. Can you help?

Absolutely. Newborns need about 16-18 hours of sleep a day for growth and development with periods of wakefulness lasting only 1–3 hours. The sleep cycle of a newborn is quite different from an adult, due to their need to feed frequently. Sleep patterns will evolve gradually as your child grows.
